top_signals.title: Asian Stocks to Fall a Second Day on Tech Worries: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia were set to decline for a second session as investors continued to rotate out of technology shares on concerns that the artificial intelligence-fueled rally has run ahead of itself.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI proposes handing Trump administration 5% stake
top_signals.summary: Sam Altman’s start-up in early talks for a public ownership deal as political pressure rises
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fed seen less likely to raise rates as job growth slows - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Fed seen less likely to raise rates as job growth slows  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Tank maker KNDS delays stock listing, citing defense-market volatility
top_signals.summary: “KNDS and its shareholders will continue to monitor the capital markets conditions closely and stand ready to resume the IPO process," the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: British Columbia mining hampered by DRIPA ‘confusion’
top_signals.summary: In June, BC’s Supreme Court lifted an injunction that had temporarily restricted construction activities pending resolution of a judicial review.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hudbay gains Peru approval to further increase Constancia mill throughput
top_signals.summary: The new permit increases the Constancia mill's processing capacity from 31 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) to 34 mtpa.

top_signals.title: Boliden in talks to buy Votorantim’s controlling stake in Nexa
top_signals.summary: Nexa is one of the world's leading zinc producers.
